note: M11b (F5) one textured wall column = the texture-v DDA + M8 sample + M8 colormap, byte-exact vs the H5 oracle (D12). src/fj/wall_render.fj (wall.column_step); build.build_textured_column. Per-pixel pipeline proof (text-output golden); the runtime framebuffer deposit/present is M11c (D2).

measured.per_pixel_note: DDA (frac>>8, &mask, +step) + M8 tex.sample (~4@) + M8 cm.apply (~4@) + output; R-1 per-pixel datapoint
measured.deposit_note: output is text (proof path); runtime framebuffer deposit of these pixels = M11c D2
